---
title: "Contact"
---

## Email
[matthew.lyle@emory.edu](mailto:matthew.lyle@emory.edu)

## Office
Goizueta Business School  
Emory University  
1300 Clifton Road NE  
Atlanta, GA 30322

## Online

- {{< ai google-scholar >}} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_ID)
- {{< ai ssrn >}} [SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=YOUR_ID)
- {{< ai orcid >}} [ORCID](https://orcid.org/YOUR-ORCID)
- {{< fa brands github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/mlyle6)
- {{< fa brands linkedin >}} [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/YOUR-HANDLE)
